course.title: Franchisee Launchpad
course.description: Your onboarding portal — from signed agreement to opening day.

instructor.name: Franchise Support Team
instructor.title: Onboarding
instructor.bio: We are here to get your location open on time.

lessons.title: Welcome to the Family
lessons.text:
Welcome aboard.

This portal walks you from signed agreement to opening day. Work through each module in order — later modules unlock as you go.

  • Module 1 — brand standards
  • Module 2 — compliance documents
  • Module 3 — final check

lessons.title: Your Brand Standards
lessons.text: Read the attached brand standards before ordering any signage. Signage ordered off-standard is not reimbursable.

lessons.title: What We Need From You
lessons.text: Upload the documents below so legal can clear your opening date. Both are required.

lessons.title: Upload your Business Licence
lessons.text: PDF or photo. Must show the expiry date.

lessons.title: Upload your Certificate of Insurance
lessons.text: Minimum coverage is in the franchise agreement, schedule C.

options.statement: Order whatever matches your landlord's rules

questions.title: Which documents must you upload before opening? (select all)
questions.explanation: Both are required before legal will clear your opening date.

lessons.title: You're Ready to Open
lessons.text: Nice work. Your onboarding certificate is attached to this lesson.
